entry.title: RES26-157 (Honolulu): INTRO → ILA
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, ACCOMODATIONS, MEALS, AND GROUND TRANSPORTATION EXPENSES VALUED AT $7,150.00 TO THE CITY FROM THE FUZHOU MUNICIPAL PEOPLE'S GOVERNMENT, PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA, FOR COUNCILMEMBER ANDRIA TUPOLA TO ATTEND THE 2026 BOND WITH KULIANG FESTIVAL IN FUZHOU, FUJIAN, CHINA.

Status: INTRO → ILA

Latest action: CR-207(26) Reported out for adoption.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-157 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, ACCOMODATIONS, MEALS, AND GROUND TRANSPORTATION EXPENSES VALUED AT $7,150.00 TO THE CITY FROM THE FUZHOU MUNICIPAL PEOPLE'S GOVERNMENT, PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA, FOR COUNCILMEMBER ANDRIA TUPOLA TO ATTEND THE 2026 BOND WITH KULIANG FESTIVAL IN FUZHOU, FUJIAN, CHINA.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
